message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.4 tick 423 — watch::Receiver::changed cancel contract

Attaches tick-423 progress comment describing the new
watch_changed_with_cx_observes_pre_cancel test (commit 7568073b).
Completes the long-lived wait primitive cancel matrix across all four
channel types (oneshot/broadcast/mpsc/watch) + semaphore + yield.
Local count 96/96 across 6 runs.
